title: calanthe veratrifolia
intro: Calanthe veratrifolia, also known as the Chinese arrowroot or false veratrum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating various kidney problems. In herbal preparations, the root of Calanthe veratrifolia is often used in decoctions or infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
